languages.text: "Вовсе не блеклый. Жизнь просто есть, ей не нужно придавать каких-то глубоких смыслов и объяснять".
"It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."
languages.original_text: "Вовсе не блеклый. Жизнь просто есть, ей не нужно придавать каких-то глубоких смыслов и объяснять".

traits.locale_text: "It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."
"It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."
"It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."

languages.text: «La vida no es desalentadora por sí misma. La vida es, sin más. No tenemos por qué asignarle ningún significado ni tratar de explicarla».
languages.original_text: "It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."

traits.locale_text: «La vida no es desalentadora por sí misma. La vida es, sin más. No tenemos por qué asignarle ningún significado ni tratar de explicarla».

languages.text: “这一点都不灰暗。生命就是生命，我们不需要给它附加什么深刻的意义，也不需要去解释它。”
languages.original_text: "It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."

traits.locale_text: “这一点都不灰暗。生命就是生命，我们不需要给它附加什么深刻的意义，也不需要去解释它。”

languages.text: « Ce n'est pas triste du tout. La vie est, tout simplement. Nous n'avons pas besoin de lui attacher un sens particulier, ni même de l'expliquer. »
languages.original_text: "It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est pas triste du tout. La vie est, tout simplement. Nous n'avons pas besoin de lui attacher un sens particulier, ni même de l'expliquer. »

languages.text: "Es ist keineswegs freudlos. Das Leben 'ist' einfach. Wir müssen ihm keine tiefe Bedeutung zuweisen oder es erklären."
languages.original_text: "It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist keineswegs freudlos. Das Leben 'ist' einfach. Wir müssen ihm keine tiefe Bedeutung zuweisen oder es erklären."

languages.text: 「人生は決して暗くはない。人生はただそうあるのだ。それに深い意味を与えたり、説明したりする必要はない。」
languages.original_text: "It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."

traits.locale_text: 「人生は決して暗くはない。人生はただそうあるのだ。それに深い意味を与えたり、説明したりする必要はない。」

languages.text: "Hiç de kasvetli değil. Hayat sadece var. Ona derin bir anlam yüklememize ya da onu açıklamaya çalışmamıza gerek yok."
languages.original_text: "It isn't bleak at all. Life simply is. We do not need to attach any deep meaning to it or explain it."

traits.locale_text: "Hiç de kasvetli değil. Hayat sadece var. Ona derin bir anlam yüklememize ya da onu açıklamaya çalışmamıza gerek yok."
